summary: Iteration 80 - All requested features verified working: WhatsApp tab restored in CRM Dashboard with green highlight, no duplicate Bookings tabs, Staff Portal WhatsApp tab shows only assigned leads' conversations, Site Settings tab works for marquee editing

test_credentials.staff: Email: testlogin@asrenterprises.com, Password: test123, Staff ID: ASR1024

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration verified working: 1) CRM Dashboard has WhatsApp tab with green highlight when active, 2) No duplicate Bookings tabs - only 'Service Price' tab exists for booking management, 3) Staff Portal WhatsApp tab shows 'Your leads only' and 'Only your assigned leads' indicators with staffMode=true filtering, 4) Staff can send WhatsApp templates to their assigned leads via Template button, 5) Site Settings tab has marquee editor with live preview, quick templates, and save functionality

features_verified.no_duplicate_bookings: WORKING - Only one booking-related tab (Service Price) exists, no duplicates
features_verified.staff_whatsapp_tab: WORKING - Shows 'Your leads only' indicator, filters conversations to staff's assigned leads
features_verified.staff_whatsapp_templates: WORKING - Staff can send WhatsApp templates to assigned leads via Template button
features_verified.site_settings_marquee: WORKING - Marquee editor with text field, enabled toggle, quick templates, live preview, and save button
